description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, a garage, and a small patch of green lawn, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The structure is primarily composed of concrete or stucco, with large, uninterrupted wall surfaces and minimal decorative elements. Windows are sparse and asymmetrically placed, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The roof is flat and likely accessible, with some areas possibly serving as terraces or utility spaces. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring a garage, recessed entryway, and a small front lawn. The structure is composed of clean lines and sparse windows, emphasizing a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, garage, and green lawn area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure and flat roof, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wall with few architectural features and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended length of the house and a small green area at the back.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, adjacent to a garage door and a small front lawn, minimal decorative elements.
